prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FACTK-63PC-ONE-BRSS Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 63pc Fabric Arts & Crafts Leather Material Hobby Working Grommet Tools Kit Description: This 63pc Grommet Kit comes with all you need to install grommets into any fabric or other material you might want.

Used in scrapbooking or other fabric crafts this is perfect for anyone interested in those hobbies. Also used to fix or reinforce holes in fabric or tarps so that they don't continue to rip, ruining the item.

Comes with grommet punch, hole punch and grommet base plate all made of drop forged zinc. Also includes 30 pieces of rust resistant brass grommets and 30 pieces of rust resistant brass washers so you can fix or repair fabrics, tarps 30 different times. Search Terms: grommet fabric hobby craft Features: - Quick and easy repair for tarp, fabric or other material - Enough grommets and washers for 30 repairs - Tool material: Drop Forged Zinc - Grommet/Washer material: Rust Resistant Brass === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Drop Forged Zinc Tools, 30 Brass Grommets And Washers, Fabric And Tarp Repair

openai.title_differentiation: Quick Tarp And Fabric Repair, Rust Resistant Brass Grommets And Washers, Drop Forged Zinc Tools, 30 Repairs
